message:
feat: NPS backend with analytics dashboard integration (#5843)

- New /api/nps Netlify Function (Netlify Blobs storage):
  POST to submit score + optional feedback
  GET returns aggregate NPS, trend, and recent responses
- NPS hook sends to /api/nps independently of analytics opt-out
  (voluntary product feedback, not passive tracking)
- Analytics page shows NPS section: score, breakdown, trend chart,
  and recent responses table
- Disclosure note explains data is collected separately

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
